# PPTX Design Guidelines

Visual design rules for InsightEngine presentation templates.

## Slide Types

| Type | Purpose | Layout |
|------|---------|--------|
| title | Opening slide | Centered title + subtitle |
| section | Section divider | Large heading, accent bar |
| content | Bullet points | Title + bullets, left-aligned |
| two-column | Side-by-side | Title + two column layout |
| image | Image showcase | Title + centered image + caption |
| chart | Data visualization | Title + chart placeholder |
| table | Tabular data | Title + styled table |
| quote | Citation | Large quote + author |
| closing | Final slide | Thank you + contact info |

## Layout Grid (16:9 = 13.33" × 7.5")

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────┐
│  0.5" margin all sides               │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────┐│
│  │ Title area: y=0.5, h=1.0        ││
│  ├──────────────────────────────────┤│
│  │ Content area: y=1.8, h=4.5      ││
│  │                                  ││
│  │                                  ││
│  ├──────────────────────────────────┤│
│  │ Footer area: y=6.8, h=0.5       ││
│  └──────────────────────────────────┘│
└──────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Typography Scale

| Element | Size | Weight |
|---------|------|--------|
| Main title (title slide) | 36-44pt | Bold |
| Slide title | 28-32pt | Bold |
| Subtitle | 18-22pt | Regular |
| Body text | 16-18pt | Regular |
| Caption / footer | 10-12pt | Regular |
| Table cell | 12-14pt | Regular |

## Color Application

### Light Themes
- Background: White (#FFFFFF) or off-white (#FAFAFA)
- Text: Dark gray (#2D3748) — never pure black
- Headings: Brand primary (dark blue, brown, etc.)
- Accent: Brand secondary for highlights, borders

### Dark Themes
- Background: Deep blue (#0F172A) or black (#0A0A0A)
- Text: Light gray (#F1F5F9) — never pure white
- Headings: Vibrant accent (indigo, cyan, gold)
- Accent: Complementary bright color

## Accessibility

- Minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for body text
- Minimum 3:1 for large text (≥24pt)
- Don't rely on color alone for meaning
- Use bold or icons alongside color indicators
